scripts.build:web: pnpm data:runtime && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/shared build && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/engine build && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data build && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/daily build && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/web build
scripts.data:runtime: pnpm data:identities && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-universe:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-season-facts:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-season-aggregates:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-season-cards:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-career-aggregates:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-career-cards:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-season-enrichment:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-career-enrichment:strict && pnpm --filter @initial-baseball/baseball-data generate:canonical-runtime-payload:strict
